setup.text: Choose a folder to store your notes. All notes are saved here as Markdown files, ready to open with any other tool.
setup.hint: Suggested: Documents\PinSlip (you can change this anytime)

error.serviceDown: Cannot connect to the local service: {{message}}

note.conflictTip: This note contains git conflict markers. Open it to resolve.
note.noSubfolders: No subfolders yet — create them in the main window
note.groupHandleTip: Drag to move group · double-click to name · right-click menu
note.groupHandleTipNamed: Group "{{name}}" · drag to move · double-click to rename · right-click menu

folders.deleteMoveNotes: Move notes to root, then delete

move.title: Move "{{title}}" to…
move.noFolders: No folders yet — create one at the top right

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoStartDevHint: Not changeable in dev mode; applies to the installed app
settings.quickClipboardTip: Pre-fill with clipboard text when the quick note window opens
settings.quickHint: Ctrl+Shift+N opens the quick note window; daily mode appends to the "Quick note YYYY-MM-DD" note
settings.trashHint: Deleted folders move to .trash; drag them back into notes/ to recover

update.hintDev: Update checks are unavailable in dev mode
update.hintIdle: Updates are checked automatically after launch
update.hintAvailable: New version v{{version}} found, downloading in the background…
update.hintDownloaded: v{{version}} is ready and takes effect after restart
update.hintError: Check failed: {{message}}. You can download the installer manually
update.devUnsupported: Update checks are not supported in dev mode

sync.formHint: Supports HTTPS repos such as GitHub / cnb; the token is stored only in .pinslip/ inside your local vault and never uploaded
sync.statusHint: Changes auto-commit after 3 idle minutes and sync every {{minutes}} min; conflicts are written as standard git markers and disappear once resolved

mcp.hint: AI tools (Kimi / Claude, etc.) can search, read, write, and sync notes via MCP; the service only listens on 127.0.0.1 and is never exposed to the LAN

conflict.banner: This note has sync conflicts — resolve them and save

quick.hint: Enter to save · Ctrl+Enter to save & continue · Shift+Enter for newline · Esc to close

serverError.SYNC_URL_REQUIRED: A repository URL is required to enable sync
serverError.SYNC_LOCAL_NOT_PINSLIP_REPO: This folder is already a git repository but not a PinSlip sync repository. Please handle .git manually before configuring sync
serverError.SYNC_REMOTE_NOT_PINSLIP_REPO: The remote repository is not a PinSlip sync repository. Please use an empty repository to avoid tangled histories
serverError.SYNC_REMOTE_ACCESS: Cannot access the remote repository. Check the URL, username, and token
serverError.SYNC_BRANCH_NOT_FOUND: The branch does not exist on the remote. Check the branch name or use an empty repository
serverError.SYNC_UNRELATED_HISTORIES: Local and remote histories share no common ancestor and cannot be merged. Please use an empty repository
serverError.SYNC_DIRTY_WORKTREE: Local uncommitted changes would be overwritten by the remote. Please commit or move the file first
serverError.NOTE_NOT_FOUND: The note does not exist or has been deleted
